targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN margin_loan_balance > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN margin_loan_balance > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 90) AS value;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 90) AS value;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, net_liquidation_value AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, net_liquidation_value AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
